title: Structured Error Response
description: Standardized error response for scheduling operations. Each error code indicates a specific failure mode, and the retryable flag tells the client whether the request may succeed on retry.

retryable.description: Whether the client should retry this request.

details.description: Optional structured details about the error.

retryAfterSeconds.description: Suggested wait time in seconds before retrying. Typically present for E_RATE_LIMITED.

examples.message: The requested slot slot-2026-04-20-0900 is no longer available.
Too many requests. Please wait before retrying.
The provider does not support slot holds.
The provided token lacks the 'bookings:write' scope required for this operation.
